with all_values as (

    select
        income_bracket as value_field,
        count(*) as n_records

    from "dealership"."raw"."customers"
    group by income_bracket

)

select *
from all_values
where value_field not in (
    '<$35k','$35k-$55k','$55k-$80k','$80k-$120k','$120k+'
)

with all_values as (

    select
        condition as value_field,
        count(*) as n_records

    from "dealership"."raw"."vehicles"
    group by condition

)

select *
from all_values
where value_field not in (
    'New','Certified Pre-Owned','Used'
)

with child as (
    select customer_id as from_field
    from "dealership"."raw"."sales"
    where customer_id is not null
),

parent as (
    select customer_id as to_field
    from "dealership"."raw"."customers"
)

select
    from_field

from child
left join parent
    on child.from_field = parent.to_field

where parent.to_field is null

-- stg_customers.sql
-- Staging model for customers.
-- Cleans and types the raw.customers table.

with source as (
    select * from "dealership"."raw"."customers"
),

renamed as (
    select
        -- keys
        customer_id,

        -- dimensions
        first_name,
        last_name,
        first_name || ' ' || last_name   as full_name,
        cast(age as integer)             as age,
        income_bracket,
        cast(credit_score as integer)    as credit_score,
        zip_code,
        state,
        preferred_contact,
        cast(is_returning as boolean)    as is_returning,

        -- derived bands
        case
            when credit_score >= 750 then 'Excellent'
            when credit_score >= 700 then 'Good'
            when credit_score >= 650 then 'Fair'
            else 'Poor'
        end                              as credit_tier,

        -- metadata
        current_timestamp                as loaded_at

    from source
)

select * from renamed

-- stg_sales.sql
-- Staging model for sales transactions.
-- Cleans, types, and enriches the raw.sales table.

with source as (
    select * from "dealership"."raw"."sales"
),

renamed as (
    select
        -- keys
        sale_id,
        vehicle_id,
        customer_id,
        rep_id,

        -- dates
        cast(sale_date as date)               as sale_date,
        date_part('year', cast(sale_date as date))  as sale_year,
        date_part('month', cast(sale_date as date)) as sale_month,
        date_part('quarter', cast(sale_date as date)) as sale_quarter,

        -- flags
        case
            when date_part('month', cast(sale_date as date)) = 12
            then true else false
        end                                   as is_december,

        case
            when date_part('month', cast(sale_date as date)) in (3, 4, 5)
            then true else false
        end                                   as is_spring,

        -- pricing metrics
        cast(asking_price_at_sale as integer) as asking_price_at_sale,
        cast(sale_price as integer)           as sale_price,
        cast(discount_amount as integer)      as discount_amount,
        cast(discount_pct as double)          as discount_pct,
        cast(gross_profit as integer)         as gross_profit,
        cast(trade_in_value as integer)       as trade_in_value,

        -- operational metrics
        cast(days_on_lot as integer)          as days_on_lot,
        financing_type,

        -- satisfaction
        cast(customer_satisfaction_score as double) as customer_satisfaction_score,

        -- derived
        case
            when days_on_lot <= 15  then 'Fast'
            when days_on_lot <= 30  then 'Normal'
            when days_on_lot <= 60  then 'Slow'
            else 'Stale'
        end                                   as aging_bucket,

        case
            when gross_profit >= 3000 then 'High'
            when gross_profit >= 1500 then 'Medium'
            when gross_profit >= 0    then 'Low'
            else 'Loss'
        end                                   as margin_tier,

        -- metadata
        current_timestamp                     as loaded_at

    from source
)

select * from renamed

-- stg_reps.sql
-- Staging model for sales representatives.
-- Cleans and types the raw.reps table.

with source as (
    select * from "dealership"."raw"."reps"
),

renamed as (
    select
        -- keys
        rep_id,

        -- dimensions
        first_name,
        last_name,
        first_name || ' ' || last_name  as full_name,
        territory,

        -- dates
        cast(hire_date as date)          as hire_date,

        -- metrics
        cast(years_experience as double) as years_experience,
        cast(monthly_quota_usd as integer) as monthly_quota_usd,

        -- metadata
        current_timestamp                as loaded_at

    from source
)

select * from renamed

-- stg_vehicles.sql
-- Staging model for vehicle inventory.
-- Cleans, types, and enriches the raw.vehicles table.

with source as (
    select * from "dealership"."raw"."vehicles"
),

renamed as (
    select
        -- keys
        vehicle_id,
        vin,

        -- dimensions
        make,
        model,
        make || ' ' || model             as make_model,
        cast(year as integer)            as year,
        trim,
        color,
        segment,
        condition,

        -- metrics
        cast(mileage as integer)         as mileage,
        cast(msrp as integer)            as msrp,
        cast(cost_basis as integer)      as cost_basis,
        cast(asking_price as integer)    as asking_price,

        -- derived
        cast(arrived_date as date)       as arrived_date,

        date_diff(
            'year',
            make_date(cast(year as integer ), 1, 1),
            current_date
        )                                as vehicle_age_years,

        round(
            cast(asking_price as double) / nullif(cast(msrp as double), 0),
            4
        )                                as price_to_msrp_ratio,

        round(
            cast(asking_price as double) - cast(cost_basis as double),
            2
        )                                as potential_gross,

        -- metadata
        current_timestamp                as loaded_at

    from source
)

select * from renamed

-- fct_sales.sql
-- Fact table for sales transactions.
-- Joins staging models into one wide analytical table.
-- Materialized as a physical table for query performance.

with sales as (
    select * from "dealership"."main_staging"."stg_sales"
),

reps as (
    select * from "dealership"."main_staging"."stg_reps"
),

customers as (
    select * from "dealership"."main_staging"."stg_customers"
),

vehicles as (
    select * from "dealership"."main_staging"."stg_vehicles"
),

final as (
    select
        -- keys
        s.sale_id,
        s.vehicle_id,
        s.customer_id,
        s.rep_id,

        -- dates
        s.sale_date,
        s.sale_year,
        s.sale_month,
        s.sale_quarter,
        s.is_december,
        s.is_spring,

        -- rep dimensions
        r.full_name                          as rep_name,
        r.territory                          as rep_territory,
        r.years_experience                   as rep_years_experience,
        r.monthly_quota_usd                  as rep_monthly_quota,

        -- customer dimensions
        c.full_name                          as customer_name,
        c.age                                as customer_age,
        c.income_bracket                     as customer_income_bracket,
        c.credit_score                       as customer_credit_score,
        c.credit_tier                        as customer_credit_tier,
        c.state                              as customer_state,
        c.is_returning                       as customer_is_returning,

        -- vehicle dimensions
        v.make,
        v.model,
        v.make_model,
        v.year                               as vehicle_year,
        v.trim                               as vehicle_trim,
        v.color                              as vehicle_color,
        v.segment                            as vehicle_segment,
        v.condition                          as vehicle_condition,
        v.mileage                            as vehicle_mileage,
        v.vehicle_age_years,
        v.price_to_msrp_ratio,

        -- pricing metrics
        s.asking_price_at_sale,
        s.sale_price,
        s.discount_amount,
        s.discount_pct,
        s.gross_profit,
        s.trade_in_value,

        -- operational metrics
        s.days_on_lot,
        s.aging_bucket,
        s.margin_tier,
        s.financing_type,

        -- satisfaction
        s.customer_satisfaction_score,

        -- metadata
        s.loaded_at

    from sales s
    left join reps      r on s.rep_id      = r.rep_id
    left join customers c on s.customer_id = c.customer_id
    left join vehicles  v on s.vehicle_id  = v.vehicle_id
)

select * from final

-- dim_reps.sql
-- Dimension table for sales representatives.
-- Aggregates performance metrics per rep for K-Means clustering
-- and LangGraph agent queries.

with reps as (
    select * from "dealership"."main_staging"."stg_reps"
),

sales as (
    select * from "dealership"."main_staging"."stg_sales"
),

rep_metrics as (
    select
        rep_id,
        count(*)                                    as total_sales,
        round(avg(sale_price), 2)                   as avg_sale_price,
        round(avg(gross_profit), 2)                 as avg_gross_profit,
        round(avg(discount_pct), 4)                 as avg_discount_pct,
        round(avg(days_on_lot), 1)                  as avg_days_on_lot,
        round(avg(customer_satisfaction_score), 2)  as avg_satisfaction_score,
        sum(gross_profit)                           as total_gross_profit,
        sum(sale_price)                             as total_revenue,
        round(avg(case when is_december then discount_pct end), 4)
                                                    as dec_avg_discount_pct,
        round(avg(case when is_december then gross_profit end), 2)
                                                    as dec_avg_gross_profit,
        count(case when margin_tier = 'High'   then 1 end) as high_margin_sales,
        count(case when margin_tier = 'Loss'   then 1 end) as loss_sales,
        count(case when aging_bucket = 'Stale' then 1 end) as stale_sales

    from sales
    group by rep_id
),

final as (
    select
        -- keys
        r.rep_id,

        -- dimensions
        r.full_name                             as rep_name,
        r.territory,
        r.hire_date,
        r.years_experience,
        r.monthly_quota_usd,

        -- performance metrics
        coalesce(m.total_sales, 0)              as total_sales,
        coalesce(m.total_revenue, 0)            as total_revenue,
        coalesce(m.total_gross_profit, 0)       as total_gross_profit,
        coalesce(m.avg_sale_price, 0)           as avg_sale_price,
        coalesce(m.avg_gross_profit, 0)         as avg_gross_profit,
        coalesce(m.avg_discount_pct, 0)         as avg_discount_pct,
        coalesce(m.avg_days_on_lot, 0)          as avg_days_on_lot,
        coalesce(m.avg_satisfaction_score, 0)   as avg_satisfaction_score,

        -- seasonal metrics
        coalesce(m.dec_avg_discount_pct, 0)     as dec_avg_discount_pct,
        coalesce(m.dec_avg_gross_profit, 0)     as dec_avg_gross_profit,

        -- quality metrics
        coalesce(m.high_margin_sales, 0)        as high_margin_sales,
        coalesce(m.loss_sales, 0)               as loss_sales,
        coalesce(m.stale_sales, 0)              as stale_sales,

        -- quota attainment
        round(
            coalesce(m.total_revenue, 0) /
            nullif(r.monthly_quota_usd * 24.0, 0),
            4
        )                                       as quota_attainment_2yr,

        -- metadata
        r.loaded_at

    from reps r
    left join rep_metrics m on r.rep_id = m.rep_id
)

select * from final
